description: Pokemon Snap playthroughs for kiosk attract mode. Used by SnapCapture.YouTubeFrameSource. Replace with your own curated list; the kiosk randomly selects one on idle timeout.

playthroughs.title: Placeholder - replace with licensed / self-recorded footage

notes: Do not ship copyrighted playthroughs in production kiosks without licensing. For in-store Blockbuster nostalgia, use self-recorded emulator footage of the NPFE ROM with the CRT overlay on; the emulator window is captured via SnapCapture.DisplayFrameSource, which also works for live demos.
